Projects.Name: Amazon.Lambda.DurableExecution
ChangelogMessages: Align ParallelAsync/MapAsync failure semantics with the JS/Python SDKs (breaking, preview). ParallelAsync and MapAsync no longer throw on failure — they always return an IBatchResult; inspect CompletionReason/HasFailure or call ThrowIfError(). The ParallelException and MapException types are removed. MapConfig.CompletionConfig now defaults to AllSuccessful() (fail-fast), matching ParallelConfig. An empty CompletionConfig() is now fail-fast (any failure resolves FailureToleranceExceeded); use CompletionConfig.AllCompleted() to run every unit regardless of failures. MapConfig is now generic (MapConfig<TItem>) so ItemNamer is typed Func<TItem, int, string> instead of Func<object, int, string>. Preview.
